feed.title: Strict Programming Language Blog
feed.subtitle: The best place to stay up-to-date with the latest Strict Programming Language news and events.

entry.title: Strict.dev website is up
entry.summary: After trying out https://jekyllrb.com/ and many themes and plugins after checking out the even more complex https://gohugo.io/ it turns out these are not good fits for the Strict language, which should be easy to install and work immediately. https:/...
